title: Phase 22.1 — Indexing Status Semantics Correction
reason: Phase 21.5 report incorrectly stated 'All 7 Indexed'. Requesting indexing is not the same as confirmed indexing. This correction aligns all reports with exact URL Inspection / GSC semantics.

allowed_statuses.ELIGIBLE: Page meets all criteria for indexing request but has not been inspected yet
allowed_statuses.INSPECTED: URL Inspection API call completed — status pending classification
allowed_statuses.CONFIRMED_REQUESTED: GSC UI showed 'indexing requested' confirmation text after clicking Request Indexing
allowed_statuses.LIKELY_REQUESTED: Request Indexing button was clicked but confirmation text did not appear in wait window. Request likely processed.
allowed_statuses.ALREADY_INDEXED: URL Inspection coverageState = 'Submitted and indexed' — page was already indexed before this request
allowed_statuses.NEWLY_INDEXED_CONFIRMED: URL Inspection confirms coverageState changed to 'Submitted and indexed' AFTER our indexing request
allowed_statuses.NOT_INDEXED: URL Inspection confirms page is not indexed (various non-indexed coverage states)
allowed_statuses.UNKNOWN_TO_GOOGLE: URL Inspection coverageState = 'URL is unknown to Google'
allowed_statuses.DEFERRED: Indexing request intentionally deferred to future recheck window
allowed_statuses.ERROR: URL Inspection or indexing request failed with an error

prohibited_statuses: 'indexed' for pages that were only requested
'all indexed' unless URL Inspection or GSC confirms
Any status that conflates requesting with indexing

current_7_url_reality.note: All 7 URLs were requested but NONE have been confirmed as newly indexed yet. Day 3 recheck (Jun 15) will determine first indexing movement.
